refnamediv.refpurpose: Combine two images using a fusion method.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: y = imfuse(x1, x2) y = imfuse(x1, x2, method) y = imfuse(x1, x2, method, alpha)

listitem.para: Second image with the same height and width as x1.
Blend ratio for "composite", from 0 to 1. Default is 0.5.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imfuse combines two images for visual comparison. The "colordiff" method converts RGB inputs to grayscale before creating a three-channel difference image. For "composite", "diff", "cascade", "max", and "min", grayscale and RGB inputs can be mixed; the grayscale input is expanded to RGB when needed.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Updated to handle grayscale/RGB input combinations and default arguments.
